#define DEBUG_TYPE   "indvars"

Function Documentation

◆ isSimpleIVUser()

bool isSimpleIVUser ( Instruction * I,
const Loop * L,
ScalarEvolution * SE )
static

Return true if this instruction generates a simple SCEV expression in terms of that IV.

This is similar to IVUsers' isInteresting() but processes each instruction non-recursively when the operand is already known to be a simpleIVUser.

Definition at line 463 of file SimplifyIndVar.cpp.

References llvm::dyn_cast(), llvm::SCEVAddRecExpr::getLoop(), llvm::ScalarEvolution::getSCEV(), I, and llvm::ScalarEvolution::isSCEVable().
